payload.claim: the dominant synthetic crack cluster was reconstructed from unresolved dependencies and invariant failures
payload.next_use: locate crack origin and repair behavior before real-agent testing

payload.claim: pre-registered endurance gates were evaluated on untouched seeds
payload.next_use: decide which endurance mechanism survives a real-agent test

payload.claim: frontier geometry, equal-budget repair, null specificity, and root-cause recovery were evaluated on frozen held-out seeds
payload.next_use: separate geometry instrumentation from claims about deployed agents

payload.claim: matched Ulam, random-sparse, clustered, and conflict-aware spacing conditions were evaluated without changing event order or random draws
payload.next_use: test graph-informed spacing on real agent traces; do not treat Ulam as a semantic separator

payload.claim: finite verified inheritance was tested over a 40/80/160 doubling ladder against continuous history and an equal-budget ordinary summary
payload.next_use: test capsule construction on real agent traces; preserve the 160-cycle and conflict-scheduling failures

payload.claim: pruning, fixed retirement, telemetry-triggered retirement, digest correction, a combined stack, and sham controls were tested beyond the inherited capsule baseline
payload.next_use: test the surviving restoration policies on real agent traces and preserve every failed gate

payload.claim: matched disturbance packets were delivered at four rates while ordinary work, order, load, horizon, and context cap remained fixed
payload.next_use: only if rate survives, test an activation-envelope intervention in a later preregistered release

payload.claim: fresh-seed matched schedules were rerun after ordinary task scratch context was made ephemeral, removing the discovered schedule-to-context pathway
payload.next_use: treat v0.8.0 as the confounded discovery run and v0.8.1 as the phase-controlled replication

payload.claim: v0.8.0 is pinned byte-for-byte and v0.8.1 reruns the matched load-rate test after removing the ordinary-work context-retention confound
payload.claim_boundary: v0.8.1 is a fresh-seed phase-controlled synthetic replication. It isolates retained context from spacing; it does not establish a deployed-agent law.
